name: Tara Brach
bio: Tara Brach is a psychologist, author, and one of the leading Western teachers of Buddhist meditation. She is the founder and senior teacher of the Insight Meditation Community of Washington, DC. She holds a PhD in clinical psychology and is known for integrating Western psychology with Eastern spiritual practices, particularly mindfulness and self-compassion. Her books 'Radical Acceptance' and 'Radical Compassion' have reached millions of readers, and her weekly podcast is one of the most popular dharma podcasts worldwide.
